supervisor_prompt:
Continue implementing the current engine-crate split from the current repo state.

  Primary source of truth:
  - docs/plans/reference_kernel_plan.md

  Active tracker:
  - docs/plans/zoon_parity_tasks.md

  Acceptance and architecture constraints:
  - docs/plans/correct_cells.md
  - docs/plans/actor_engine_performance_plan.md
  - docs/engine/ACTORS_ENGINE_OPTIMIZATIONS.md

  Target scope:
  - split the three browser engines into separate workspace crates
  - keep `boon` as the shared core crate
  - final workspace should contain:
    - `boon`
    - `boon-engine-actors`
    - `boon-engine-dd`
    - `boon-engine-wasm`
    - existing seam crates (`boon-scene`, `boon-monitor-protocol`, `boon-renderer-zoon`)
  - do not introduce a shared production runtime core
  - keep engines independent and aligned with the later standalone-crates direction

  Required end state:
  - no engine implementation remains inside `crates/boon/src/platform/browser/engine_*`
  - actor-only browser stdlib/interpreter code lives in `boon-engine-actors`
  - DD engine code lives in `boon-engine-dd`
  - Wasm engine code plus Wasm-only lowering/metrics/report APIs live in `boon-engine-wasm`
  - `boon` keeps parser, shared core/browser types, and reference-kernel code only
  - `boon` does not depend on engine crates
  - engine crates may depend on `boon`, but not on each other
  - no long-term compatibility re-exports from `boon` for engine internals
  - playground frontend depends directly on the engine crates and owns host-side engine-availability/default/clear-state logic
  - tools depend directly on `boon-engine-wasm` for Wasm lowering verification and backend metrics
  - path-sensitive tooling and active docs are updated to the new crate paths

  Implementation rules:
  - make reasonable decisions without asking unless blocked by missing information or a genuinely risky decision
  - keep the final API shape honest: `boon` stays core, callers import engine crates directly
  - do not use `#[path]` cross-crate inclusion, symlinks, or a fake shared runtime shim
  - do not leave duplicate source trees behind after the move
  - update scripts and active docs that hardcode old in-tree engine paths
  - keep behavior unchanged; this is a structural split, not a semantic rewrite

  Verification required before claiming completion:
  - `cargo check -p boon`
  - `cargo check -p boon-engine-actors`
  - `cargo check -p boon-engine-dd`
  - `cargo check -p boon-engine-wasm`
  - `cargo check --manifest-path playground/frontend/Cargo.toml --features engine-actors`
  - `cargo check --manifest-path playground/frontend/Cargo.toml --features engine-dd`
  - `cargo check --manifest-path playground/frontend/Cargo.toml --features engine-wasm`
  - `cargo check --manifest-path playground/frontend/Cargo.toml --features engine-all`
  - `cargo build --manifest-path tools/Cargo.toml --release`
  - `timeout 900s ./target/release/boon-tools exec test-examples --engine Actors --skip-persistence`
  - `timeout 900s ./target/release/boon-tools exec test-examples --engine DD --skip-persistence`
  - `timeout 900s ./target/release/boon-tools exec test-examples --engine Wasm --skip-persistence`
  - `timeout 600s ./tools/scripts/test_todo_mvc_physical.sh --engine Actors`
  - `timeout 600s ./tools/scripts/test_todo_mvc_physical.sh --engine DD`
  - `timeout 600s ./tools/scripts/test_todo_mvc_physical.sh --engine Wasm`
  - `./tools/scripts/verify_7guis_complete.sh --static-only`

  Development loop:
  - run relevant checks as you go and fix what you break
  - if flaky automation, tooling, verification scripts, or test harnesses are slowing progress or making validation unreliable, fix them too when that helps development move faster and more reliably
  - if the implementation path starts looking too complex, too hacky, or circular, or you seem to be spinning in circles, step back, reconsider the plan, and choose a simpler direction that still matches
  the source-of-truth docs instead of forcing a local workaround
  - stop only at a real blocker or when the whole split is done
  - if you stop, leave the repo coherent and report the exact next step
completion_prompt:
Do not implement anything new yet. First verify, as rigorously as feasible from the current repo state, whether the engine-crate split is actually finished.

  Primary source of truth:
  - docs/plans/reference_kernel_plan.md

  Active tracker:
  - docs/plans/zoon_parity_tasks.md

  Acceptance and architecture constraints:
  - docs/plans/correct_cells.md
  - docs/plans/actor_engine_performance_plan.md
  - docs/engine/ACTORS_ENGINE_OPTIMIZATIONS.md

  Check each required outcome explicitly against the real codebase and real command results. Do not treat plan-file status text by itself as sufficient evidence.

  Verify all of the following from the current repo state:
  - workspace members now include separate engine crates:
    - `boon-engine-actors`
    - `boon-engine-dd`
    - `boon-engine-wasm`
  - `boon` remains the shared core crate
  - no engine implementation code remains under `crates/boon/src/platform/browser/engine_*`
  - `boon` does not re-export engine internals as the final public API
  - playground frontend depends directly on the engine crates and no longer relies on `boon` engine feature passthrough
  - tools import Wasm lowering/metrics APIs from `boon-engine-wasm`, not from `boon`
  - path-sensitive tooling and active docs were updated to the new crate paths
  - the result is still aligned with engines staying independent and moving toward separate standalone crates rather than a shared production runtime

  Run the relevant checks, tests, and tooling needed to support your conclusion:
  - `cargo check -p boon`
  - `cargo check -p boon-engine-actors`
  - `cargo check -p boon-engine-dd`
  - `cargo check -p boon-engine-wasm`
  - `cargo check --manifest-path playground/frontend/Cargo.toml --features engine-actors`
  - `cargo check --manifest-path playground/frontend/Cargo.toml --features engine-dd`
  - `cargo check --manifest-path playground/frontend/Cargo.toml --features engine-wasm`
  - `cargo check --manifest-path playground/frontend/Cargo.toml --features engine-all`
  - `cargo build --manifest-path tools/Cargo.toml --release`
  - `timeout 900s ./target/release/boon-tools exec test-examples --engine Actors --skip-persistence`
  - `timeout 900s ./target/release/boon-tools exec test-examples --engine DD --skip-persistence`
  - `timeout 900s ./target/release/boon-tools exec test-examples --engine Wasm --skip-persistence`
  - `timeout 600s ./tools/scripts/test_todo_mvc_physical.sh --engine Actors`
  - `timeout 600s ./tools/scripts/test_todo_mvc_physical.sh --engine DD`
  - `timeout 600s ./tools/scripts/test_todo_mvc_physical.sh --engine Wasm`
  - `./tools/scripts/verify_7guis_complete.sh --static-only`

  Do not claim completion unless:
  - each engine is in its own Rust crate
  - the host dependencies were migrated cleanly
  - the old in-tree engine layout is gone
  - and Actors, DD, and Wasm still run the important playground examples and 7GUIs correctly under Zoon with concrete evidence

  If anything is incomplete:
  - say the split is not finished
  - list the remaining gaps clearly
  - give the exact next step

  If it is complete:
  - provide a milestone-by-milestone completion report with concrete evidence for each item
  - include the real command results that justify the conclusion
